message:
fix: critical bug fixes across hero, project-card, page, consulting, and glow-orbits

Fixes multiple critical bugs introduced in 31dc382:
- project-card.tsx: useTransform called inside JSX (Rules of Hooks violation) — moved to top level
- app/page.tsx: motion.div used in async server component — extracted to SnapshotCard client component
- hero.tsx: mismatched motion.div/div closing tag
- consulting/page.tsx: missing cn import
- glow-orbits.tsx: mousemove listener memory leak (gsap.context callback return ignored)
- site-header.tsx: useReducedMotion null coercion for NavItem prop
- site-footer.tsx: missing eslint-disable for setYear in useEffect

Also includes:
- Remove 200 lines of dead code (LazySection, TimelineSkeleton, AnimatedGridItem)
- Fix 3 stale test expectations (viewBox 460, rust-port kind, line→path selector)
- Update tool count references from 13 to 14 across page.tsx, tldr/layout.tsx, about/page.tsx, e2e tests
- Extract reusable client components: magnetic.tsx, nav-item.tsx, homepage-snapshot.tsx, thread-card.tsx
- Close beads: p59k (Performance Test Suite), 2wqt (Performance Epic), k3a1 (Remove LazySection)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
